reviews.author: Lovepreet Singh Sandhu
reviews.review_body: I AM ALSO A MUPLICAN OF MUSSOORIE PUBLIC SCHOOL MUSSOORIE WHICH IS ASSOCIATED WITH WELHAM BOYS SCHOOL DEHRADUN AND ITS A CO EDUCATIONAL SCHOOL WITH MANY FACILITIES AND BEHAVIOUR OF ALL TEACHERS AND STAFF WITH THEIR STUDENTS,  THIS SCHOOL ALSO BEST IN SPORTS, MUSIC,LITERA LITERATURE, EDUCATION

reviews.review_body: Good school for education. Beautiful surroundings. Peace and calm.

reviews.school_name: Mussoorie Public School - The Mall Road
reviews.author: dilber mann
reviews.review_body: Went to school here in 1984 / 85.  I have to say it was a mix of experiences having come from Canada, but I still hold on to the memories often.  I’m a little sad to see all the changes over the years and hope to see Mussoorie again soon to relive those memories.  In retrospect, I owe a lot to my short time attending Mussoorie.

reviews.school_name: Mussoorie Public School - The Mall Road
reviews.author: Abdullah Khalid
reviews.review_body:
My father majeed khalid laghari

was evacuated by British in November 1947 as the only Muslim ☪️ student left .the rest 3 Muslim ☪️ student mumtaz aashiq and mahshouq Ali bhutto never returned after summer holidays. My father later studied in aitichson college lahore died 2015AD

reviews.school_name: Mussoorie Public School - The Mall Road
reviews.author: Saket Sharma
reviews.review_body: I'm an ex student of the school. I found most of my talent and my passion in the hallways and library of Mussoorie Public School. Its a great and a spiritual emvironment here. Great teachers back when I was there in the school (2000 - 2011). A great place to be in. Great memories. I have spent 11 years of my life here and I must tell this to everyone that it was worth it. This great institution taught me values of life and how to achieve your goals. I'm greatly indebted to this great school and to my teachers. God Bless everyone!!

reviews.school_name: Mussoorie Public School - The Mall Road
reviews.author: Sharad Kumar Gupta
reviews.review_body:
It is an English medium co- educational residential school recognised by the State Government and affiliated to the Council for the Indian School Certificate Examinations, New Delhi and prepares children for the Indian Certificate of Secondary Education ( ICSE -10 ) and the Indian School Certificate ( ISC - 12 ) Examinations. These examinations are recognised by State Education Boards and Universities as equivalent to the High School and Intermediate examinations respectively, and after passing ISC - 12 examination, a child can either join graduate courses at any university or can compete for admission to professional courses such as medicine, engineering and technology and also for entrance to National Defence Academy, Khadakwasla (Pune) .

The school office, assembly flat, dining rooms, dormitories for girls and sub-junior boys are located in the main building, Pratap Bhawan, which has with it about 2 acres of land for playground and gardens. A spacious hall, with a seating capacity for 450, is situated close to Pratap Bhawan. The Auditorium also serves as an Assembly Hall, an indoor games complex, apart from other activities conducted here.

The class rooms are located in the academic block, another wing contiguous to the main building. Dormitories for senior boys, and science laboratories are located in Vivekanand Bhawan, adjacent to the academic block, on Camel's Back Road.

Programmes of S.U.P.W.(Socially Useful Productive Work) through 'Shrama-dan' are also organised.
